policy: signals only; no duplicate, canonical, merge, archive or deletion decision without branch-aware proof

families.signal: strong filename/date relationship with extreme size divergence
families.required_next: inventory all branches; compare commit ancestry, root trees, manifests, identity configuration and deployment files

families.signal: adjacent dated names and near-equal metadata size
families.required_next: compare commits, trees, manifests and configuration; do not select latest filename automatically

families.signal: same product name with dated snapshots
families.required_next: map branch history, schema, features and deployment configuration before canonical decision

families.signal: strategic platform and ERP naming overlap; scope may differ
families.required_next: preserve independently; compare architecture, API contracts, database schema, manifests, branches and features

families.signal: operational service family with credential and deployment risk
families.required_next: inventory branches and service roles; scan history for secret references without exposing values
compare project manifests, platforms, authentication modules, endpoints and commit ancestry

families.signal: same product name with one-year dated variants
families.required_next: compare branches, trees, schema and feature differences
establish upstream provenance and compare local modifications, schema and business logic

families.signal: dense dated/versioned family; three new members have identical reported size
families.required_next: branch-aware commit/tree comparison and feature/schema mapping; filename chronology and equal size are insufficient
inventory every ref and compare generated code, schema, domain data and deployment configuration under privacy controls
